title: Faithful: PAEDirectionalBlur param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 5.3 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEDirectionalBlur must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEDirectionalBlur to range extremes across hosts ['Blurs__Directional', 'Stylized__Light_Sweep'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=5.35 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEDirectionalBlur implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEDirectionalBlur` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.349}, {"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "mix", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.364}, {"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "angle", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.375}, {"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "angle", "theta": 3.1416, "t": 0.25, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.376}, {"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "angle", "theta": 3.1416, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.377}, {"host": "Blurs__Directional", "param": "crop", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.1, "oracle_signal": 137.308, "ddb": 5.377}]
